title: aita for not consulting my dad before quitting my job?
text: i (22f) decided to quit my part time job due to stress. when i got home i told my dad and he's now mad at me.  i live with him because the housing situation in my city sucks majorly. i need some time to recoup and give myself some self care and love, but my dad is pissed off at me because i didn't tell him or talk to him beforehand.  my younger brother (16m) is special needs and requires a level of care, so money is kinds tight and i was paying a little less than half of utilities, but apparently he'll have a hard time paying the extra money.  plus, he now needs to pay for my dog's food and any care he might need. but i don't feel like i did anything wrong because i was struggling and i don't have to get permission from my father to do what i want with my life.  my dad says that i should've consulted him beforehand though.

storyboard.content: I am 22 years old and live with my dad because the housing situation in my city is bad. My younger brother is 16 and has special needs that require a level of care, so money is tight.
I was paying a little less than half of the utilities, and my dad also covers my dog’s food and care.
I decided to quit my part-time job and told my dad after I had already done it, without consulting him beforehand.
I was struggling with stress and needed some time to recoup and give myself self-care. I don’t feel like I need permission from my father to make decisions about my own life.
My dad is now mad at me and says I should have consulted him beforehand, because he’ll have a hard time paying the extra money.
My dad now has to cover my share of utilities and my dog’s expenses on top of his existing financial obligations.
